description_long: This is a large, cylindrical horizontal storage tank mounted on a set of rail wheels and tracks, commonly used for transporting hazardous liquids or gases. The tank is painted a dark, weathered blue-black with visible rust patches and features a prominent red 'DANGER' warning stenciled on its side. A metal access ladder is attached to the side, leading up to a circular hatch or manway on the top of the tank, which is likely used for filling or inspection. The tank is supported by a robust metal frame and sits on two sets of bogies, allowing it to move along the railway tracks. There are visible pipe attachments and a valve on the top, suggesting points for loading or unloading contents. The overall construction is industrial and utilitarian, designed for durability and safety in hazardous material transport.
description: A weathered, cylindrical rail-mounted storage tank with a red 'DANGER' warning, access ladder, and top hatch, designed for hazardous material transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'DANGER' warning, access ladder, and full length of the tank on tracks.
description_view_1: End view showing the circular face of the tank and the rail tracks extending forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the 'DANGER' warning and ladder visible.
description_view_3: Rear end view showing the back circular face of the tank and the tracks.
